/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared  -o rosidl_generator_py/custom_interfaces/custom_interfaces_s__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces_s__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_generator_py/custom_interfaces/_custom_interfaces_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/yura/firstprogram/build/custom_interfaces:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_dynamic_typesupport.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libfastcdr.so.2.2.7 libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib
